name: db-connect-tool
description: DEFERRED: Connection will be implicit via schematic metadata, not explicit tool calls. Original: MCP tool for establishing database connections.
acceptanceCriteria: ArkType params schema: { connectionString: string, name?: string, dialect?: 'postgres'|'sqlite' }
Stores connection in MCP state via setConnection()
Returns { ok: true, connected: true, name: string, dialect: string }
Returns { ok: false, error: {...} } on connection failure
Validates connection by running simple query (SELECT 1)
Default name is 'default', default dialect is 'postgres'
registerDbConnect(server) follows existing tool registration pattern
